prestazioni: AMG M297 7.3L V12 engine (specific to Zonda Fantasma Evo) upgraded with a custom billet crankshaft by JE Pistons (88mm stroke, 96mm bore) paired with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (12.5:1 compression ratio) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 900+ HP reliability at 8,200 RPM redline

Twin Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbochargers (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with custom Inconel turbine housings by TurboSmart, paired with a bespoke air-to-water intercooler system (PWR Advanced Cooling) and 45mm external wastegates (TurboSmart Elite 2000 series) for 2.2 bar peak boost

Full titanium exhaust system by Capristo (4-2-1 equal-length headers, 3.5" primary tubes) with a 304 stainless steel center section and carbon fiber mufflers, terminating in dual 4.5" outlets with electronically controlled butterfly valves (Capristo Valvetronic) for backpressure optimization
estetica: Full carbon fiber bodywork by Novitec Torado (Zonda Fantasma-specific widebody kit with 50mm extended fenders, front splitter with active Gurney flap, and a rear diffuser with integrated titanium strakes for 1,200 kg downforce at 250 km/h)

Custom 20" front / 21" rear forged aluminum wheels by Dymag (carbon fiber rims, 9.5" front / 13" rear widths) wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (255/30 R20 front, 345/25 R21 rear) with TPMS sensors by Continental

Interior reupholstered in bespoke Alcantara (Rosso Corsa with black stitching) by Sabelt, featuring a full carbon fiber dashboard with a Motec C187 digital dash (OLED display, 12 data channels) and a custom titanium shift knob by Pagani Automobili (weighing 180g)
